variants: Chibueze Onoriode is known for his significant contributions to Equine Science, particularly through his authored work, Blueprint for Infinite Threads. He is an engaged member of the Hazelwood Betrayers Club, where he exchanges ideas with others who share his passion for the field. Under the mentorship of Marcus Keilberg, he has cultivated his expertise and gained valuable insights. Moreover, Chibueze's research endeavors are primarily supported by the Rosehaven Reward Trust, which provides crucial funding for his innovative projects.
